columns.name: First & Last Name
columns.stage: What stage of building a business are you at?
columns.job: What is your job title or industry? (what do you refer to yourself as?)😍
columns.magic: If I could wave a magic wand and solve ONE problem for you when it comes to online business what would it be? 🪄🔮🧚‍♀️
columns.time_spent: What are you spending the MOST time on in your business rn? ⏳
columns.wish: What do you WISH you were doing instead (work-related or otherwise)? 💫
columns.laptop: 🌞 What’s the first thing that runs through your head when you open your laptop in the morning? (no wrong answers)
columns.holding: What do you think is holding you back most in your business right now? 😅
columns.social: 🌶️ Vibe-check: How do you feel about these: [📱 Social Media]
columns.email_mkt: 🌶️ Vibe-check: How do you feel about these: [💌 Email Marketing]
columns.pinterest: 🌶️ Vibe-check: How do you feel about these: [📌 Pinterest]
columns.content: If I were to create more content, trainings, workbooks, and courses, what would you want me to cover?  Check all that apply.
columns.showme: 🥹 Finish this sentence: “I just want someone to show me how to…”
columns.advice: What business advice have you heard online that you DON'T want to take? 🙅‍♀️
columns.purchased: Have you purchased products, courses, or services from me before? If not, what is the reason you haven't? (no judgement, just curious 😇)
columns.worth: What would make a course feel undeniably worth it to you, like a total no-brainer?  (Nothing is off the table - tell me your wildest dreams for business support 🔮🪄)

magic|Need more clients / sales: Leads on Autopilot (I don't have enough time to spend on my business)
consistent automated sales - I want to be able to work 3 weeks a month and take a week off
magic|Automated / evergreen systems: Disappear tech issues to seamlessly connect creativity to all marketing channels
Setting systems and getting more clients
I would love to sell out my high ticket offers through reliable systems vs. high energy
magic|Email list / email marketing: Walk away from social media forever and have everything grow bigger and better ie. email, blog, community, courses, podcast, coaching, etc
Mapping out the set up of all things CRM (best email platforms for small startup, budget checkout options, landing page platforms etc)
magic|Social media fatigue: Blueprint how to attract customers 😂. Especially from Pinterest and Instagram, where my ideal customers hang out the most

I wish I had an answer to help you, but I’ve tried so many things to make money and bring clients in, it feels like nothing helps!

advice|Need more clients / sales: requiring sales to come from a place of urgency. which i know is so counter intuitive against sales psychology, my entire being just repels at the thought of it lol
Sales calls 🤣 I haven’t done a sales call since 2021!
advice|Email list / email marketing: new freebies for email list building
Start a podcast. Girl I’m already trying to figure out a million things, I can’t add a podcast to my long ass list lol
advice|Social media fatigue: I am tired of IG crap that talks about gaming algorithms.
That I need to be on IG or FB to succeed
advice|Content creation / messaging: that content needs to be hard
just keep posting more! Create video content! Show your face more!

Hustle culture - I'm a splenic manifestor (human design) so I'm not built to hustle or work non stop - I need breaks so It's important that I create a business that nourishes me and makes money for me while I rest and when I'm on I'm on!
advice|Offer clarity / productization: That you shouldn’t make pricing accessible
Using storytelling in a very forced way. For example hey yesterday I spilled my coffee and it made me think about (very forced connection) so buy this offer 🙄
posting 3x a day. needing to show up on socials to make sales. too much noise on what my offer should be.
advice|Time / capacity / overwhelm: I am tired of IG crap that talks about gaming algorithms.
be on instagram all the time. hustle until you don’t need to anymore.
That I have to post all the time on socials to grow & put hours making trendy cinematic reels with fancy editing
advice|Confidence / fear / mindset: Be the best at what you do. Like nobody ever has imposter syndrome?
advice|Hands-on support / accountability: showing up everyday on social media will help you grow your business
All of the rules about Instagram that work but I’m not willing to live on my phone.
worth|Need more clients / sales: has sure fire results and gets me more clients

Feeling like the person genuinely cares and isn’t just trying to make money off me without me actually learning, having the funds to pay for it, evidence that it can actually help me, it helps me towards my goal of financial and time independence, teaches me w
worth|Automated / evergreen systems: A tech day where group people bring all their tech questions. A tune up session where you go thru all workflows looking for errors and ways to optimize

I LOVE courses, if anything I’m a sucker for really really good templates, honestly I love your resources. Maybe a community / accountability buddy system? I feel like an A+ student but I tend to do all the things at once vs. knowing how to break it up
To help me create systems in place to run my business smoothly
worth|Email list / email marketing: less than $300, a mix of how to videos, audio and done for you templates, something with short lessons less than 30 minutes that can quickly teach me real things that will move the needle in my business. I don't need another "step 1- create a freebie. step 2-e
worth|Social media fatigue: it's not about what it is, it's about the vibe from it so cozy, nerdy, library, fireplace vibes of a secret garden library far away from the noise of social media and the online orgy space would be fab!

I want something that's unique to me, coupled with strategy and group support. I want something that dives into ways of client generation beyond social media. Something that teaches if I meet a prospect at a networking event or through a referral how can I bui
No putting yourself out there uncomfortably on social media, no video, and getting everything organized in one place after figuring out just exactly what to do. Big goals huh :)
worth|Pinterest / search traffic: Social media - how to use Pinterest and set it up, content calendar walkthrough
worth|Content creation / messaging: Have no idea what I need to be successful seller so 🤷🏻‍♀️
To help me create systems in place to run my business smoothly

ADHD biz hand holding. building a back end with me so i know how to consume, when, how to note take (hello endless notebooks), how to use AI to help me create content, have systems to keep track of 'all the things', see progress, stay on track with my goals. m
worth|Offer clarity / productization: moving from service to products ... best way not to confuse things
Actually I see the value in everything you offer already!
worth|Time / capacity / overwhelm: I don't know that I have the brain capacity to even dream of it, let alone do it.

Feeling like the person genuinely cares and isn’t just trying to make money off me without me actually learning, having the funds to pay for it, evidence that it can actually help me, it helps me towards my goal of financial and time independence, teaches me w
If it actually helped me fit it in to my busy schedule and feel good about selling.
worth|Clarity / step-by-step direction: A simple plug and play plan
Step by step on what to do
worth|Hands-on support / accountability: higher level training and support. too many courses are not for where i am at in business
Focused transformation/outcome. Instant access so I can proceed at my own pace. Async support to get Qs answered. I've been craving community, so small accountability groups would be awesome as well.
